statements.query: MATCH (s)-[r:HAS_NODE]->(node:GCPInstance) WHERE (s:GKECluster OR s:GKENodePool) AND (s)<-[:RESOURCE]-(:GCPProject{id: $GCP_PROJECT_ID})<-[:OWNER]-(:GCPOrganization{id:$GCP_ORGANIZATION_ID})<-[:OWNER]-(:CloudanixWorkspace{id: $WORKSPACE_ID}) AND r.lastupdated <> $UPDATE_TAG WITH r LIMIT $LIMIT_SIZE DELETE r return COUNT(*) as TotalCompleted

name: cleanup GCP GKE to Compute relationships
